generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on the motor for position measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotPositionDataStream
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder positioned behind the gearbox for backlash reduction and positional accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotPositionDataStream
]

instance RobotPositionDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder
]

instance PositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time position data from motor and gearbox encoders streamed via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotPositionDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink, Cpp, Java
]

instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor driving the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance SinumerikController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller for precise motion control of the MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance MABIMAX100System : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MotorActuator, SinumerikController, MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder
]

instance SysMLIBDs : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structural components modeled via SysML Internal Block Diagrams (IBDs) for component interfaces and interconnections"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysML
]

    base:desc "Component interfaces and interconnections modeled using ACME Architecture Description Language"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACME
]

instance AADLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [

    DTDFVocab:inputTo AADL
]

instance MontiArcAutomaton : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral models using MontiArc Automaton for system dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArc
]

instance SysMLStateMachines : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral models using SysML v1.7 state machines for system control"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysML
]

instance SimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical models implemented with MathWorks Simulink for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink
]

instance CppModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Detailed system behavior implementation using C++ programming language"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Cpp
]

instance JavaModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Detailed system behavior implementation using Java programming language"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Java
]

instance SysML : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for multi-level abstraction modeling (requirements, functional, logical, technical layers)"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService, BehavioralModelingService
]

instance ACME : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACME Architecture Description Language for component interfaces and interconnections"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance AADL : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AADL Architecture Description Language for component interfaces and interconnections"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance MontiArc : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton for behavior modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables BehavioralModelingService
]

instance Simulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for dynamic system simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance Cpp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ programming language for detailed system behavior implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables BehavioralModelingService, SimulationService
]

instance Java : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Java programming language for detailed system behavior implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables BehavioralModelingService, SimulationService
]

instance RFLP : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RFLP methodology for multi-level abstraction modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance OOSEM : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "OOSEM methodology for requirements and functional architecture"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance SPES : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SPES methodology for logical architecture and product layer"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance SMArDT : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SMArDT methodology for complexity management in system design"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService

instance StructuralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Structural modeling service using SysML IBDs, ACME, and AADL for component interfaces and interconnections"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyEnhancement, OperationalEfficiencyImprovement
]

instance BehavioralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Behavioral modeling service using MontiArc Automaton and SysML state machines"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyEnhancement, OperationalEfficiencyImprovement
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dynamic simulation service using MathWorks Simulink for motion analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyEnhancement, OperationalEfficiencyImprovement
]

instance MotionAccuracyEnhancement : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Enhanced motion accuracy through precise digital twin modeling of mechanical dynamics and control system"
]

instance OperationalEfficiencyImprovement : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Improved operational efficiency via real-time monitoring and simulation of robot performance"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system maintains real-time synchronization through automated one-way data flow from physical assets to the digital representation, with active components processing live data streams for immediate state updates."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is validated through quantitative comparison of simulated data against measured data to assess deviations. Uncertainty sources such as mechanical backlash and positional inaccuracies are quantified using sensor data, with error correction mechanisms integrated into the control loop to maintain data consistency and model accuracy."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems is achieved via Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for standardization, sensor data streaming using MQTT protocol, and connection to Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl industrial controllers."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system utilizes industry-standard modeling languages and architecture description languages (ADLs) such as SysML [17], AADL [24], ACME [23], and MontiArc [25], [26] for structured representation across multiple abstraction levels (requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, and product/technical layers). These standards support component & connector modeling, including interfaces and interconnections, and integrate with simulation tools like MathWorks Simulink [28], general-purpose languages (C++, Java), and address heterogeneous stakeholder integration [31]."
]
